title: Ryazan、Ryazan Oblast — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Ryazan、Ryazan Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Ryazan是Ryazan Oblast的一个城市，人口约540,000。A historic city southeast of Moscow, known for its magnificent Kremlin, the Ryazan Museum of Long-Range Aviation, and traditional crafts.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
